title: OnyxGuard Black Medical Grade Nitrile Examination Gloves - Multipurpose, Powder Free and Latex Free Disposable Gloves - Box of 100, Large
features: Latex free disposable nitrile glove; powder free to stop hands from drying out and designed for use in dentistry, healthcare, tattoo/piercing and more.
Comfortable fit- providing a close to skin feel with textured tips to allow for more control and improved dexterity.

The beaded cuff on this multipurpose glove provides extra strength and helps prevent liquid roll back whilst the medium weight construction is suitable for contact with food and chemical resistantance.
Textured palms and fingertips provide improved grip, particularly in wet or oily conditions and touchscreen compatibility allows you to use mobile and tablet displays without removing the gloves
Items delivered: 1 x pack of 100 OnyxGuard disposable examination gloves, food safe, chemical resistant, powder free, chlorinated AQL 1.5, size L, in black.
description: Product Description OnyxGuard- Black Nitrile Gloves - Trusted by professionals. Strong & Flexible OnyxGuard gloves have been developed to be ultra thin yet super strong and flexible allowing for improved dexterity and feel for the user. Premium Quality OnyxGuard gloves have been tested to the highest standards and have been approved for use for both PPE and Medical applications. Powder Free OnyxGuard gloves are food safe and also approved for medical use. No need to remove gloves when using a tablet or phone as these gloves have the added benefit to work with most touchscreen devices. Versatile OnyxGuard gloves are versatile and cater for numerous industries. Ideal uses; Tattooing, Medical, Dental, Healthcare, Car detailing.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Disposable, Latex Free, Medical Grade, Ambidextrous, Touchscreen compatible
